description_long: This is a blue coupe car with a sporty, modified appearance, featuring a custom paint job with anime-style graphics on both sides. The vehicle has a pickup-style rear bed, visible engine modifications in the back, and gold alloy wheels that add to its racing aesthetic. The front fascia is aggressive, with a white bumper, black hood, and detailed headlights. The side profile reveals a two-door configuration, tinted windows, and prominent side skirts. The rear view showcases a black tailgate with additional graphics and a visible exhaust system. The car's overall design suggests it is intended for show or performance use, likely appealing to automotive enthusiasts.
description: A blue, anime-themed coupe car with gold wheels, custom graphics, and a modified pickup rear bed. It features a sporty, aggressive design with visible engine modifications and detailed exterior elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white bumper, black hood, detailed headlights, and a license plate.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the anime graphics, gold wheels, two-door layout, and visible rear bed modifications.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the black tailgate with graphics, exposed engine components in the bed, and rear lights.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with anime graphics, gold wheels, and a clear view of the pickup bed.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
